name: Dime Community Bancshares Inc. 9.000% Fixed-to-Floating Rate Subordinated Notes due 2034
summary: Dime Community Bancshares Inc.'s 9.000% Fixed-to-Floating Rate Subordinated Notes due 2034 are debt securities issued by the company. These notes represent a borrowing by the company and pay interest at a specified rate. Dime Community Bancshares is a bank holding company headquartered in Hauppauge, New York.
